practice.title: Criminal matters before the High Court
practice.subtitle: Focused representation in bail, appeals, quashing petitions, and criminal litigation at Allahabad High Court and the Lucknow Bench.
practice.regularBailDesc: Applications for regular bail in sessions and High Court matters with thorough fact-and-law preparation.
practice.anticipatoryBailDesc: Pre-arrest protection and anticipatory bail before Allahabad High Court and Lucknow Bench.
practice.crpc482Desc: Quashing petitions and inherent-power applications to set aside FIRs and abusive proceedings.
practice.criminalAppealsDesc: Appellate strategy, written submissions, and oral advocacy in criminal appeals and revisions.
practice.criminalLitigationDesc: Trials, revisions, sentencing matters, and allied criminal proceedings across forums.
practice.highCourtDesc: Dedicated practice before the Allahabad High Court and Lucknow Bench across criminal jurisdictions.

faq.title: Questions clients ask us
faq.q1: How quickly can I get a consultation?
faq.a1: We typically respond within 24 hours. Urgent matters are prioritized same-day when possible.
faq.q2: What should I bring to the first meeting?
faq.a2: Bring any court orders, agreements, notices, or documents related to your matter. A brief written summary helps us prepare.
faq.q3: Do you handle cases outside Lucknow?
faq.a3: Yes. We represent clients across Uttar Pradesh and India, with strong High Court and district court practice.
faq.a4: We provide transparent fee estimates after understanding your matter — fixed fees, retainers, or stage-wise billing as appropriate.
faq.a5: Absolutely. All communications are protected by attorney-client privilege.

cta.title: Your matter deserves clarity — not confusion
cta.subtitle: Book a confidential consultation. We'll map your options before costs escalate.

footer.tagline: Trusted High Court legal counsel — criminal bail, appeals, and strategic advocacy at Allahabad High Court and Lucknow Bench.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: From first brief to final order — modular legal services that scale with your matter.
services.ctaSubtitle: Describe your situation — we'll route you to the right next step.
services.phasesSubtitle: Each phase ends in a decision point so you control spend and direction.
services.phase1Desc: Confidential conversation, document review, and scope alignment.
services.phase2Desc: Options, costs, and likely timelines documented before any commitment.
services.phase3Desc: Drafting, filings, hearings — with status updates you can audit.
services.phase4Desc: Final order, advisory note, and a clear next-step roadmap.

regularBail.title: Regular bail applications
regularBail.desc: Structured bail petitions with fact sheets, precedents, and conditions tailored to your matter.
regularBail.long: We prepare and argue regular bail applications in sessions courts and before the Allahabad High Court, focusing on custody grounds, case strength, and proportionate conditions.

anticipatoryBail.title: Anticipatory bail
anticipatoryBail.desc: Urgent pre-arrest relief with rapid drafting and court-ready submissions.
anticipatoryBail.long: When arrest is imminent, we move quickly on anticipatory bail — coordinating with investigating agencies where appropriate and framing limitations that protect your liberty.

crpc482.title: CrPC Section 482 petitions
crpc482.desc: Quashing of FIRs and proceedings through inherent powers of the High Court.
crpc482.long: We assess whether proceedings amount to abuse of process and draft Section 482 petitions with tight factual narration and precedent alignment for quashing or narrowing the scope of prosecution.

criminalAppeals.title: Criminal appeals & revisions
criminalAppeals.desc: Appellate briefs and oral advocacy in criminal appeals before the High Court.
criminalAppeals.long: From conviction appeals to revision petitions, we build judge-first narratives, evidentiary charts, and oral submissions designed for appellate benches at Allahabad and Lucknow.

criminalLitigation.title: Criminal litigation
criminalLitigation.desc: End-to-end defence and prosecution support across criminal forums.
criminalLitigation.long: Trials, bail cancellations, sentencing hearings, and allied criminal work — with documented strategy, responsive updates, and disciplined courtroom presence.

urgent.title: Urgent criminal applications
urgent.desc: Same-day triage for bail, stay, and emergency motions.
urgent.long: When time is critical, we prioritise urgent bail, stay, and liberty applications with rapid drafting and registry coordination at the High Court.

focus.title: Practice areas
focus.subtitle: Deep experience in the criminal matters most often litigated before the Allahabad High Court and Lucknow Bench.
focus.bailP1: Bail applications prepared with clear fact narration, medical or personal circumstances, and binding precedents.
focus.bailP2: We advise on realistic conditions and forum strategy before filing.
focus.anticipatoryP1: Pre-arrest applications framed to address investigation stage concerns and protect liberty.
focus.anticipatoryP2: Coordination with counsel at district level when parallel proceedings are active.
focus.crpc482P1: Careful screening of whether proceedings are an abuse of process warranting quashing.
focus.crpc482P2: Drafting that isolates legal defects without over-reaching — a bench-sensitive exercise.
focus.appealsP1: Appeals structured around errors of law, evidentiary gaps, and sentencing proportionality.
focus.appealsP2: Written and oral work reviewed for clarity, citation discipline, and operational execution.
focus.ctaTitle: Describe your matter — we'll outline the path
focus.ctaSubtitle: A short confidential conversation helps us assess urgency, forum, and likely timelines.
focus.applyTitle: See how this applies to your case
focus.applySubtitle: We can usually provide initial orientation within one business day of your inquiry.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: We provide strategy-first legal counsel backed by responsive communication and well-documented representation before the Allahabad High Court and Lucknow Bench.
about.storyTitle: Experience & growth in High Court practice
about.storyP1: Shivam Mishra & Associates began with a strong commitment to client-focused representation in criminal and appellate matters before the Allahabad High Court.
about.storyP2: Through handling a diverse range of legal matters — from bail and quashing petitions to criminal appeals — we have built expertise and successfully represented numerous clients while establishing a reputation for reliable legal advice and effective courtroom advocacy.
about.growth1: Started legal practice with a strong commitment to client-focused representation.
about.growth2: Built expertise through handling a diverse range of legal matters.
about.growth3: Successfully represented numerous clients before the High Court.
about.growth4: Established a reputation for reliable legal advice and effective courtroom advocacy.
about.advocateRole: High Court Advocate · Allahabad High Court & Lucknow Bench
about.advocateBio: Practising before the Allahabad High Court and Lucknow Bench with a focus on criminal bail, anticipatory bail, CrPC Section 482 petitions, and criminal appeals — combining disciplined courtroom advocacy with clear, responsive client communication.
about.advocateAlt: Adv. Shivam Mishra in advocate's robes at the High Court
about.officeAlt: Adv. Shivam Mishra reviewing case files at chambers
about.commitment3: Allahabad High Court & Lucknow Bench practice
about.value1Desc: We speak plainly, even on complex matters.
about.value2Desc: Your matter stays inside a small, accountable team.
about.value3Desc: Filings, hearings, and updates — on time, every time.
about.value4Desc: Legal problems are also human problems. We treat them that way.

internship.title: Legal internship
internship.subtitle: Apply online for hands-on experience in criminal research, drafting, and High Court preparation — with mentorship and real briefs.
internship.programmeDesc: We welcome law students who want practical exposure to criminal practice before the Allahabad High Court and Lucknow Bench. Interns work on research, drafting, and case preparation under direct supervision.
internship.scopeIntro: Interns contribute to real matters, including:
internship.scope1: Legal research and analysis on criminal law issues
internship.scope2: Drafting research memoranda and case notes
internship.scope3: Preparing case briefs for bail and appellate matters
internship.scope4: Assisting with case preparation and court filings
internship.scope5: Documenting educational qualifications and areas of legal interest
internship.lookForIntro: We welcome applications from law students who demonstrate:
internship.lookFor2: A willingness to learn and a professional attitude
internship.lookFor4: High levels of motivation and enthusiasm
internship.durationP1: To keep each internship meaningful and focused, we offer a limited number of places per 4-week term. All applications are reviewed carefully by our team.
internship.durationP2: We look forward to mentoring individuals who are ready to grow in a real-world legal environment.
internship.faq1A: We offer a limited number of positions for a focused 4-week term. Applications are reviewed by our team to match availability and interest.
internship.faq2A: Terms such as stipend or academic credit depend on the intake cycle. Please mention your expectations in your application and we will discuss during shortlisting.
internship.faq3A: Law students in recognised programmes who are committed to professional conduct and can commit to the schedule. Final-year students and motivated juniors are all welcome to apply.
internship.faq4Q: What kinds of work will I see?
internship.faq4A: Interns work on criminal matters including bail, CrPC Section 482 petitions, appeals, and allied litigation before the Allahabad High Court and Lucknow Bench.
internship.faq5Q: Can I book a call before applying?
internship.faq5A: Yes. You can reach us through the contact page to discuss timelines, or include specific questions in your statement of interest.
internship.faq6A: We aim to respond within a reasonable time after each review cycle. If you need an update on a pending application, write to us with your name and date of submission.

form.title: Apply for internship
form.subtitle: Submit your details and upload your CV. We review applications on a rolling basis.
form.name: Full name
form.areasHint: e.g. Criminal law, bail practice, appellate advocacy…
form.coverLetterHint: Tell us why you want to intern with us and your availability…
form.successDesc: Thank you. We will review your application and contact you if there is a suitable opening.

legal.disclaimerIntro: By clicking 'I Agree', you acknowledge that:
legal.disclaimerPoint1: This website is intended solely for informational purposes.
legal.disclaimerPoint3: Accessing this website does not create an attorney-client relationship.
legal.disclaimerPoint4: This website is not intended for solicitation or advertisement as prohibited under Bar Council of India rules.
legal.privacyMeta: Privacy policy for Shivam Mishra & Associates — how we collect, use, and protect your information.
legal.privacyIntro: {{firm}} (“we”, “our”, “us”) respects your privacy. This policy explains how we handle personal information collected through our website and consultation forms.
legal.privacyCollectionBody: We may collect your name, email address, phone number, case-related information you voluntarily submit, and technical data such as IP address and browser type when you use our website.
legal.privacyUseBody: We use collected information to respond to inquiries, schedule consultations, process internship applications, improve our services, and comply with legal obligations. We do not sell your personal data.
legal.privacySharingBody: We may share information with service providers who assist in website hosting, email delivery, or analytics, subject to confidentiality obligations. We may disclose information when required by law or court order.
legal.privacyRightsBody: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data by contacting us at {{email}}. We will respond within a reasonable timeframe as required under applicable Indian law.
legal.privacySecurityBody: We implement reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your information. However, no internet transmission is completely secure.
legal.termsMeta: Terms governing use of the Shivam Mishra & Associates website.
legal.termsIntro: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of the {{firm}} website. By using this website, you agree to these terms.
legal.termsAcceptanceBody: If you do not agree to these terms, you must not use this website.
legal.termsNoAdviceBody: Content on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. You should consult a qualified advocate for advice specific to your situation.
legal.termsNoRelationshipBody: Use of this website, submission of forms, or communication through this site does not create an attorney-client relationship until a formal engagement is agreed in writing.
legal.termsLiabilityBody: To the fullest extent permitted by law, {{firm}} shall not be liable for any damages arising from your use of or reliance on this website.
legal.termsGoverningBody: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Courts in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
legal.termsContactBody: For questions about these terms, contact us at {{email}}.
legal.disclaimerPageMeta: Legal disclaimer for Shivam Mishra & Associates website in compliance with Bar Council of India rules.
legal.disclaimerPageIntro: This disclaimer governs your use of the {{firm}} website. Please read it carefully before using our site.
legal.disclaimerInfoBody: All content published on this website is intended to provide general information about legal topics and our practice areas. It should not be relied upon as a substitute for professional legal advice.
legal.disclaimerBciBody: This website is not intended for solicitation or advertisement of legal services in any manner prohibited by the Bar Council of India Rules. No content on this site shall be construed as an invitation or inducement to engage our services.
legal.disclaimerJurisdictionBody: Our advocacy practice is primarily before courts in Uttar Pradesh, India. Information on this site may not apply to matters in other jurisdictions.
legal.disclaimerContactBody: For clarifications, reach us at {{email}} or {{phone}}.
